parameters.pythonCode: # A bug in the Python Code node prevents it from accessing data from nodes further than one step back. Please ensure the 'host' and 'body' fields are transferred from the node immediately preceding this one. # Generated by AI import json from html.parser import HTMLParser from datetime import datetime, timedelta import re # --- Configuration --- # In n8n, use the current execution time CURRENT_NOW = datetime.now() # For testing consistency with the prompt context (Saturday, Jan 3, 2026) # You can comment this out in production to use real time # CURRENT_NOW = datetime(2026, 1, 3, 9, 16, 0) # --- Input Handling --- try: # n8n specific access to input data html_content = _items[0]["json"]["body"] except (NameError, IndexError, AttributeError): html_content = "" def parse_date(date_text): """ Parses various date formats found on the site. Returns ISO format string or None. """ if not date_text: return None date_text = date_text.strip().lower() # 1. Standard Date: "2025-12-14 11:55" iso_match = re.search(r'(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})\s+(\d{2}:\d{2})', date_text) if iso_match: # Add seconds to make it full ISO format return f"{iso_match.group(1)} {iso_match.group(2)}:00" # 2. Relative Date: "сегодня в 14:30", "вчера в 09:15" # Extract time portion time_match = re.search(r'(\d{1,2}:\d{2})', date_text) if time_match: time_str = time_match.group(1) target_date = CURRENT_NOW.date() if 'вчера' in date_text: target_date = target_date - timedelta(days=1) # 'сегодня' is the default target_date return f"{target_date} {time_str}:00" # 3. Just "Сегодня" or "Вчера" without time (fallback to 00:00 or current time) if 'сегодня' in date_text: return CURRENT_NOW.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') if 'вчера' in date_text: yesterday = CURRENT_NOW - timedelta(days=1) return yesterday.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') return None class NeagentParser(HTMLParser): def __init__(self): super().__init__() self.apartments = [] self.current_item = None self.in_card = False self.in_date_span = False self.temp_date_text = "" def handle_starttag(self, tag, attrs): attrs_dict = dict(attrs) classes = attrs_dict.get('class', '').split() # Detect Card Start if tag == 'div' and 'c-card' in classes: # Check if we were already in a card (structure safety) if self.in_card: self.finalize_current_item() item_id = attrs_dict.get('id', '') if not re.match(r'^\d+$', item_id[1:]): raise ValueError(f"ID '{item_id}' does not match pattern '^\d+$'") if item_id.startswith('n'): self.in_card = True self.current_item = { 'id': item_id[1:], # Remove 'n' prefix 'link': '', 'time_text': '', 'update_time': None, 'host': _items[0]["json"]["host"], } # Inside Card Logic if self.in_card and self.current_item is not None: # Extract Link if tag == 'a' and 'c-card__title' in classes: href = attrs_dict.get('href', '') # Fix relative URLs if href.startswith('//'): href = 'https:' + href elif href.startswith('/'): href = 'https://neagent.by' + href self.current_item['link'] = href # Start Date Capture if tag == 'span' and 'date' in classes: self.in_date_span = True self.temp_date_text = "" def handle_data(self, data): if self.in_date_span: self.temp_date_text += data def handle_endtag(self, tag): if self.in_date_span and tag == 'span': # Process Date Text raw_text = self.temp_date_text.strip() # Clean junk text like "собственник" or "агент" clean_text = raw_text.split('собственник')[0].split('агент')[0].strip() if self.current_item is not None: if clean_text: self.current_item['time_text'] = clean_text self.current_item['update_time'] = parse_date(clean_text) else: # Fix for empty date (e.g. First Item/Highlighted ads) # If date text is missing but card exists, imply "Now" self.current_item['time_text'] = "Сейчас" self.current_item['update_time'] = CURRENT_NOW.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') self.in_date_span = False # Determine Card End # Since 'c-card' divs are nested or adjacent, we rely on the start of the next card # or the end of the input to finalize. However, if we hit the end of the container # listing-container, we might close it. # For simplicity in this flat structure, we don't strictly close on # because counting div depth is error-prone without a robust stack. def finalize_current_item(self): if self.current_item: # Validation: Filter out items without a link # This handles "Moved" or "Ad Removed" blocks that have an ID but no title link if self.current_item.get('link'): self.apartments.append(self.current_item) self.current_item = None self.in_card = False # --- Execution --- parser = NeagentParser() parser.feed(html_content) # Ensure the very last item is processed parser.finalize_current_item() # Format Output output = { "source": "https://neagent.by/komnata/snyat?hasPhotos=1", "extraction_date": CURRENT_NOW.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), "total_apartments": len(parser.apartments), "apartments": parser.apartments } return output
